data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: YouTube utilizes a microservices architecture, allowing for scalability and independent service management.
data.technical_spec: Deployed on cloud platforms, using container orchestration tools like Kubernetes.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: CDN is used to deliver video content quickly to a global audience.
data.technical_spec: Globally distributed servers with caching mechanisms.

data.title: Data Replication
data.description: Ensures high availability and fault tolerance of data across regions.
data.technical_spec: Multiple data centers with replication strategies in place.

data.title: Scalable Storage Solutions
data.description: Handles massive amounts of video data with scalable storage solutions.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes distributed databases and storage technologies.

data.title: Real-time Video Processing
data.description: Enables real-time streaming and processing of video content.
data.technical_spec: Leverages GPU acceleration and distributed computing resources.
